insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE ID = #id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_VOTE_QUESTION( ID, TENANT_ID, CONTENT, MULTI_SELECT, CREATE_DATE, START_DATE, END_DATE, TARGET, TITLE, SECRET_VOTE, CREATOR, CREATOR_NAME1, CREATOR_NAME2, FILE_PATH, RESULT_FIRST, SET_DATE, IS_SORTING, IS_SELONLYONCE, SENDPOSTNOTICE, OPENTOALL ) VALUES( #id#, #tenant_id#, #content#, #multi_select#, #create_date#, #start_date#, #end_date#, #target#, #title#, #secret_vote#, #creator#, #creator_name1#, #creator_name2#, #file_path#, #result_first#, #set_date#, #is_sorting#, #is_selonlyonce#, #sendpostnotice#, #opentoall# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION SET CONTENT = #content#, MULTI_SELECT = #multi_select#, CREATE_DATE = #create_date#, START_DATE = #start_date#, END_DATE = #end_date#, TARGET = #target#, TITLE = #title#, SECRET_VOTE = #secret_vote#, CREATOR = #creator#, CREATOR_NAME1 = #creator_name1#, CREATOR_NAME2 = #creator_name2#, FILE_PATH = #file_path#, RESULT_FIRST = #result_first#, SET_DATE = #set_date#, IS_SORTING = #is_sorting#, IS_SELONLYONCE = #is_selonlyonce#, SENDPOSTNOTICE = #sendpostnotice#, OPENTOALL = #opentoall# WHERE ID = #id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT QST_ID , USER_ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isNotEqual:
UPDATE TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION SET USER_TYPE = #type#
WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT ID , QST_ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE ID = #id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_VOTE_ANSWER( ID, QST_ID, TENANT_ID, CONTENT, VOTES_NUM, FILE_PATH ) VALUES( #id#, #qst_id#, #tenant_id#, #content#, #vote_number#, #filePath# )
insert.isNotEqual:
UPDATE TBL_VOTE_ANSWER SET CONTENT = #content#, VOTES_NUM = #vote_number#, FILE_PATH = #filePath#
WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND ID = #id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(ID),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND MODIFYING = 1
SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_TYPE = #type#
SELECT TARGET FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ID = #qst_id#
SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND SEEN = 1

SELECT a.ID AS qstid, a.TENANT_ID AS tenantid, a.CONTENT AS content, a.MULTI_SELECT AS multiselect, a.CREATE_DATE AS createdate, a.START_DATE AS startdate, a.END_DATE AS enddate, a.TARGET AS target, a.TITLE AS title, a.SECRET_VOTE AS secretvote, a.CREATOR AS creator, a.CREATOR_NAME1 AS creatorname1, a.CREATOR_NAME2 AS creatorname2, a.FILE_PATH AS filepath, a.RESULT_FIRST AS resultfirst, a.IS_MODIFYING AS ismodifying, a.SET_DATE AS setdate, a.IS_SORTING AS inssorting, a.IS_SELONLYONCE AS isselonlyonce, a.SENDPOSTNOTICE AS sendpostnotice, a.OPENTOALL AS opentoall, ((SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE QST_ID = a.ID and TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID)) AS CMTCNT FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION a WHERE a.ID IN ( SELECT QST_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION WHERE ( USER_TYPE = 'user' AND USER_ID = #user_id# ) OR ( USER_TYPE = 'company' AND USER_ID = #company_id# ) OR ( USER_TYPE = 'dept' AND USER_ID IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE ( FIND_IN_SET (CN, #v_deptPath#) OR CN = 'Top' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# ) ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# ) AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
a.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
a.CREATOR_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
a.CREATOR_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')

SELECT a.ID AS qstid, a.TENANT_ID AS tenantid, a.CONTENT AS content, a.MULTI_SELECT AS multiselect, a.CREATE_DATE AS createdate, a.START_DATE AS startdate, a.END_DATE AS enddate, a.TARGET AS target, a.TITLE AS title, a.SECRET_VOTE AS secretvote, a.CREATOR AS creator, a.CREATOR_NAME1 AS creatorname1, a.CREATOR_NAME2 AS creatorname2, a.FILE_PATH AS filepath, a.RESULT_FIRST AS resultfirst, a.IS_MODIFYING AS ismodifying, a.SET_DATE AS setdate, a.IS_SORTING AS inssorting, a.IS_SELONLYONCE AS isselonlyonce, a.SENDPOSTNOTICE AS sendpostnotice, a.OPENTOALL AS opentoall, ((SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE QST_ID = a.ID and TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID)) AS CMTCNT FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
a.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
a.CREATOR_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
a.CREATOR_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')

SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE CREATOR = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
CREATOR_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
CREATOR_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #search_str#, '%')
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_ANSWER WHERE ANS_ID = #opt_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_ANSWER WHERE ANS_ID = #opt_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
SELECT QST_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND HIDE = 1

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT QST_ID , USER_ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED SET HIDE = 1 WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT QST_ID , USER_ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED SET MODIFYING = 1 WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED SET MODIFYING = 0 WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED SET HIDE = 0 WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT QST_ID , USER_ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED SET SEEN = 1 WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT QST_ID , USER_ID , TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED SET COMMENT = 1 WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE ID = #opt_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE ID = #id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
DELETE FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_ANSWER WHERE ANS_ID = #opt_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_ANSWER SET VOTES_NUM = VOTES_NUM + #value# WHERE ID = #opt_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION SET END_DATE = #end_date# WHERE ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION SET IS_MODIFYING = #value# WHERE ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

UPDATE TBL_VOTE_COMMENT SET TEXT_CONTENT = #text_content#, IMAGE_TYPE = #image_type#, FILE_TYPE = #file_type#, FILE_NAME = #file_name#, FILE_PATH = #file_path# WHERE ID = #id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(FILE_PATH) FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND FiLE_PATH = #file_path#
SELECT count(FILE_PATH) FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND ID <> #qst_id# AND FiLE_PATH like CONCAT('%', #file_path#, '%')
SELECT FILE_PATH FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND ID = #qst_id#
SELECT FILE_PATH FROM TBL_VOTE_ANSWER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND FILE_PATH IS NOT NULL
SELECT FILE_PATH FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND LENGTH(FILE_PATH) > 0
SELECT FILE_TYPE FROM TBL_VOTE_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND LENGTH(FILE_TYPE) > 0
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND QST_ID = #qst_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_VOTE_QUESTION SET END_DATE = #end_date# WHERE QST_ID = #qst_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND OPENTOALL = 1

SELECT a.user_id AS CN, b.password, IFNULL(b.displayname, a.user_id) AS DISPLAYNAME, IFNULL(b.displayname2, a.user_id) AS DISPLAYNAME2, b.department, b.description, b.description2, b.title, b.title2, b.companyid, b.company, b.company2, b.updatedt, b.rollinfo, b.telephonenumber, b.mail, b.jikchek, a.tenant_id, b.deptPathCode, b.primaryLang, b.gyumJik, b.userFileUrl, b.sabun FROM ( SELECT QST_ID, USER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_VOTE_QUESTION_RELATED WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id# AND SEEN = 1 ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#) union all SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# UNION ALL SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#) ) b ON a.USER_ID = b.cn
SELECT * FROM TBL_VOTE_USER_AND_QUESTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND QST_ID = #qst_id#

SELECT CN AS CN, password, IFNULL(displayname, CN) AS DISPLAYNAME, IFNULL(displayname2, CN) AS DISPLAYNAME2, department, description, description2, title, title2, companyid, company, company2, updatedt, rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, jikchek, tenant_id, deptPathCode, primaryLang, gyumJik, userFileUrl, sabun FROM ( SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#) UNION ALL SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# UNION ALL SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#) ) a WHERE 1 = 1
(
a.CN IN (
#userList[]#
)
a.CN IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER where DEPARTMENT in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptUserList[]# OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%\,',#deptUserList[]#,'\,%') OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#deptUserList[]#,'\,%')) AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# )
)

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT concat('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primaryLang, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE tenant_id = #tenant_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#)
(
a.CN IN (
#userList[]#
)
a.CN IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER where DEPARTMENT in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #deptUserList[]# OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%\,',#deptUserList[]#,'\,%') OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#deptUserList[]#,'\,%')) AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#) )
)
